zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Peter de Middleton KNIGHT於1290年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德米德萊頓時，他的父親Sir William de Middleton21歲，母親Agnes le Boteler18歲。他於1320年與Eustacia Plumpton在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德馬勒斯堂聖 馬也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1335年被列為high sheriff  of yorkshire。他去世於1335年10月23日在英國越可爾米德萊頓享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Peter de Middleton KNIGHT于1290年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德米德萊頓时，他的父亲Sir William de Middleton21岁，母亲Agnes le Boteler18岁。他于1320年与Eustacia Plumpton在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德馬勒斯堂聖 馬也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1335年被列为high sheriff  of yorkshire。他去世于1335年10月23日在英国越可爾米德萊頓享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Middleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so called. In over thirty instances from many different areas, the name is from Old English midel ‘middle’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. However, Middleton on the Hill near Leominster in Herefordshire appears in Domesday Book as Miceltune, the first element clearly being Old English micel ‘large’, ‘great’ (see Middlebrook ). Middleton Baggot and Middleton Priors in Shropshire have early spellings that suggest gem̄thhyll (from gem̄th ‘confluence’ + hyll ‘hill’) + tūn as the origin. This surname is also found in Scotland and Ireland.

History: A Scottish family of this name derives it from lands at Middleto(u)n near Kincardine. The Scottish physician Peter Middleton practiced in New York City after 1752 and was one of the founders of the medical school at King's College (now Columbia University) in 1767. One of the earliest of the Charleston, SC, Middleton family of prominent legislators was Arthur Middleton, born in Charleston in 1681. The name has also been established in Ireland since at least the 13th century; its presence was reinforced by settlers in the 17th century.

variants.name: Midthun
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of about ten farmsteads in western Norway named Midtun, from Old Norse mith ‘middle’ + tún ‘enclosure, farmstead’. Compare Middleton .

variants.name: Melton
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, and Yorkshire, all of which have the same origin as Middleton , with Old English middel replaced by its Old Norse equivalent methal after the Scandinavian settlement of northern and eastern England.

variants.name: Middlebrook
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost Micklebrook in Blackburn (Lancashire), recorded as Mikelbroc in the 13th century. The placename appears to derive from Old English micel ‘big’ + brōc ‘brook, stream’. The surname has undergone a dissimilatory or folk-etymological change from Mickle- to Middle-.

variants.name: Milton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the many places called Milton, or sometimes Middleton (see Middleton ) and occasionally Melton (see Melton ), most of which derive from Old English middel ‘middle’ or myln ‘mill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Peter de Middleton KNIGHT was born in 1290, in Middleton, Westmorland, England, his father, Sir William de Middleton, was 21 and his mother, Agnes le Boteler, was 18. He married Eustacia Plumpton in 1320, in St Mary's Church, Mallerstang, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. In 1335, at the age of 45, his occupation is listed as high sheriff  of yorkshire. He died on 23 October 1335, in Middleton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 45, and was buried in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Peter de Middleton KNIGHT est né en 1290, à Middleton, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Middleton, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Agnes le Boteler, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Eustacia Plumpton en 1320, à St Mary's Church, Mallerstang, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. En 1335, à l’âge de 45 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff  of yorkshire. Il est décédé le 23 octobre 1335, à Middleton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Peter de Middleton KNIGHT 1290 in Middleton, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Middleton 21 und seine Mutter Agnes le Boteler 18. Er hat 1320 in St Mary's Church, Mallerstang, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom Eustacia Plumpton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1335, als er 45 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff  of yorkshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 23. Oktober 1335 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Middleton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peter de Middleton KNIGHT è nato il nel 1290 nel Middleton, Westmorland, England, il suo padre, Sir William de Middleton, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Agnes le Boteler, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Eustacia Plumpton nel 1320, nel St Mary's Church, Mallerstang, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1335, all'età di 45 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff  of yorkshire. Morì il 23 ottobre 1335, nel Middleton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de Middleton KNIGHTが1290年にイギリスウエストモーランドミッドレトンで生まれた時，父Sir William de Middletonは21歳，母Agnes le Botelerは18歳であった。1320年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドマラースタンスト マリ'ス チャーチでEustacia Plumptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1335年，45歳の時，職業はhigh sheriff  of yorkshireと記録されている。彼は1335年10月23日にイギリスヨークシュアイアミッドレトンで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de Middleton KNIGHT(이)가 1290년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 미들레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Middleton(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes le Boteler(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 맬레르스탠그 스트 마이'스 c후르치에서 Eustacia Plumpton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1335년, 45세의 나이로 그의 직업은 high sheriff  of yorkshire이었다. 그는 1335년 10월 23일 영국 요르크실르 미들레턴에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peter de Middleton KNIGHT nasceu em 1290, em Middleton, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Middleton, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Agnes le Boteler, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Eustacia Plumpton em 1320, em St Mary's Church, Mallerstang, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1335, com 45 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff  of yorkshire. Ele faleceu em 23 de outubro de 1335, em Middleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Mary's Church, Plumpton, Yorkshire, E: ст мэри'с чурч, маллирстанг, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Peter de Middleton KNIGHT родился в 1290 г. в местности миддлетон, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de Middleton было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes le Boteler, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Eustacia Plumpton в 1320 г. в местности ст мэри'с чурч, маллирстанг, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1335 году, в возрасте 45 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff  of yorkshire. Он умер 23 октября 1335 г. в местности миддлетон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Peter de Middleton KNIGHT nació en 1290, en Middleton, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Middleton, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Agnes le Boteler, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Eustacia Plumpton en 1320, en St Mary's Church, Mallerstang, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1335, a la edad de 45 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff  of yorkshire. Murió el 23 de octubre de 1335, en Middleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
